hypothesis.thesis_statement: A growth-weighted composite combining institutional accumulation, ROE growth, operating profit growth, EPS growth, ROE stability, and medium-term price momentum will outperform on a long-short basis in the A-share mainboard universe, because joint signals of accelerating profitability AND informed buying are systematically underweighted by retail-dominated price formation.
hypothesis.mechanism: Behavioral under-reaction to growth persistence combined with institutional confirmation. Phase 1 quick-kill screening (2014-2026, horizons 5/10/20d) on the post-republish provider showed that single growth factors with positive rank_icir often have NEGATIVE long-short Sharpe, indicating the cross-sectional ordering signal concentrates in untradable tails. The 6 components selected for this composite are the only ones that exhibit BOTH positive rank_icir AND positive long-short Sharpe, which are: alpha_inst_net_buy_20d (ICIR 0.29, Sharpe +3.23), grow_roe_yoy (ICIR 0.18, Sharpe +1.89), grow_opprofit_yoy (ICIR 0.13, Sharpe +1.58), grow_eps_yoy (ICIR 0.15, Sharpe +1.51), grow_opprofit_qoq (ICIR 0.13, Sharpe +1.43), grow_netprofit_yoy (ICIR 0.12, Sharpe +1.43). The composite combines these with two confirmation layers (qual_roe_stability, mom_return_60d) to reduce false positives from one-quarter spikes. Note: alpha_inst_net_buy_20d coverage is sparse (~20/1210 in blue-chip sample 2024) so the +3.23 Sharpe is on a small sample; weighted at 0.20 to cap sample-size risk.

source.title: Phase 1 quick-kill screening for growth-stock hypothesis-driven plan

pre_registered_concerns.most_likely_failure_mode: The composite collapses to alpha_inst_net_buy_20d's signal because the alpha factor's standalone Sharpe (+3.23) dominates the others, and the underlying coverage is too sparse (~20/1210 non-null in blue-chip 2024 probe) to be statistically reliable when applied to the broad universe. If alpha_inst_net_buy_20d's signal is sample-size artifact rather than genuine alpha, the composite degrades to the weighted average of the 5 weaker growth components which collectively carry rank_icir < 0.20.
pre_registered_concerns.weakest_assumption: That positive long-short Sharpe observed on individual growth components in Phase 1 sandbox screening (without trading costs, full universe, no industry/size neutralization) survives in the formal IS run with realistic costs, mainboard universe filtering, and size+industry neutralization.
pre_registered_concerns.what_would_falsify_this: Falsified if formal IS rank_icir < 0.025, OR composite Sharpe < equal-weight-component average by >0.005 absolute (the baseline-beat custom rule), OR cost-adjusted Sharpe goes negative, OR sealed OOS rank_ic falls outside [0.025, 0.06] CI.
pre_registered_concerns.priors_on_cost_sensitivity: Moderately cost-sensitive. The 10-day rebalance keeps annual turnover ~3.0-3.5x. Phase 1 LS Sharpes were measured WITHOUT costs; realistic 10bps slippage + stamp tax + transfer fee will reduce Sharpe by ~0.2-0.4. Expected to remain positive but the cost-adjusted floor (0.45) is intentionally set below the deflated-Sharpe floor (0.65) to accommodate this.
